features.name: repeated_single_bit_concat_equality_compare
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of a single-bit signal repeated multiple times compared for equality against a constant pattern that cannot be formed by identical bits

features.name: two_single_bit_concat_equality_compare
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of two different single-bit signals each repeated multiple times, compared for equality against a constant pattern that cannot be formed by those repeated bits
